Bash(/tmp/find_shortcut.ps1 << 'PSEOF'
# Find WinClaw shortcuts on Desktop and Start Menu
$paths = @\(
    [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Desktop'\),
    [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('CommonDesktopDirectory'\),
    [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('StartMenu'\),
    [Environment]::GetFolderPath\('CommonStartMenu'\)
\)
foreach \($p in $paths\) {
    $found = Get-ChildItem -Path $p -Recurse -Filter "*inclaw*" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
    foreach \($f in $found\) {
        Write-Host "Found: $\($f.FullName\)"
        if \($f.Extension -eq '.lnk'\) {
            $shell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
            $shortcut = $shell.CreateShortcut\($f.FullName\)
            Write-Host "  Target: $\($shortcut.TargetPath\)"
            Write-Host "  Args: $\($shortcut.Arguments\)"
            Write-Host "  WorkDir: $\($shortcut.WorkingDirectory\)"
        }
    }
}
PSEOF)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v2026.2.17: fix WinClawUI re-launch, channel status, MCP bridge plugin

- Fix WinClawUI single-instance activation by using fixed window class
  name instead of title-based FindWindow \(title changes after WebView2
  navigation\)
- Fix "No Channels" status bar by loading channel status on gateway
  WebSocket connect instead of only on tab navigation
- Add MCP Bridge plugin for forwarding MCP tool calls to gateway
- Add Chrome debug safety script \(ensure-chrome-debug.ps1\)
- Add desktop-app-control skill
- Update Windows skills \(explorer, office, outlook, system\)
- Bump all plugin versions to 2026.2.17
- Published to npm: winclaw@2026.2.17
- Windows installer: WinClawSetup-2026.2.17.exe \(85MB\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v2026.2.18: fix installer trim bug, distribute chrome-devtools scripts

- Fix CHANGELOG* glob pattern deleting changelog.js from node_modules
  \(root cause of ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND for pi-coding-agent/changelog.js\)
- Fix rebuild-installer.ps1 *.ts filter deleting .d.ts declaration files
- Add scripts/launch-chrome-devtools-mcp.ps1 \(auto port detection wrapper\)
- Add scripts/ensure-chrome-debug.ps1 env var persistence \(CHROME_DEBUG_PORT\)
- Distribute chrome-devtools scripts in npm package \(package.json files[]\)
- Distribute chrome-devtools scripts in Windows installer \(Inno Setup .iss\)
- Version bump to 2026.2.18, published to npm and installer built \(84.8MB\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v2026.2.18-1: fix EPERM when running from C:\\Program Files

- Fix resolveRequiredHomeDir\(\) fallback to avoid using process.cwd\(\)
  when cwd is a read-only system path \(C:\\Program Files\\WinClaw\)
- Add LOCALAPPDATA → APPDATA fallback chain on Windows before cwd
- Guard against known read-only prefixes on all platforms
- Final fallback to os.tmpdir\(\) instead of failing with EPERM
- Update home-dir tests for new fallback behavior
- Version bump to 2026.2.18-1, published to npm and installer built

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v2026.2.19: model selector fix, multi-session chat, WinClawUI stability

Phase 5: WinClawUI stability — Logger, WebView2 crash recovery, Gateway watchdog
Phase 6: Config validation — provider type correction
Phase 7: WinClawUI silent exit — FormClosing intercept, heartbeat timer
Phase 8: Model ID mismatch fix, duplicate provider resolution
Phase 9: Model selector — replace mode skips implicit providers, remove
         allModels fallback so only configured models appear in selector

Key changes:
- ensureWinClawModelsJson\(\) now branches on mode before resolving providers
- models.list RPC no longer falls back to full catalog when filter is empty
- Multi-session chat with per-session workspace
- WinClawUI Logger, WinClawBridge, crash recovery improvements
- Chrome DevTools MCP launcher scripts
- Version bump to 2026.2.19

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
v2026.2.20: exec-log console, skill Phase 12 restructuring, tool event forwarding

- feat\(ui\): real-time execution log console panel in chat sidebar
  - Terminal-style log display with dark/light theme support
  - Auto-open on Bash tool execution, manual dismiss respected
  - Sidebar mode switching \(markdown ↔ exec-log\)
  - Auto-scroll, clear, 5000-line buffer limit
- feat\(gateway\): forward tool events to TOOL_EVENTS recipients even when verbose=off
  - Control UI now declares TOOL_EVENTS capability
  - Enables exec-log without requiring verboseLevel config change
- refactor\(skills\): Phase 12 ai-dev-system-testing restructuring
  - Move scripts/prompts/config/docs to references/ directory
  - Add phase5b/5c efficient loop scripts and prompts
- fix\(WinClawUI\): GatewayManager and MainForm stability improvements
- chore: bump version to 2026.2.20, sync plugin versions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
